message:
Command `ls /nc/ip/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NO /nc/ip/ - mount lost on session restart"
ls /nc/pdk/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "NO /nc/pdk/"
echo "---"
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE' in d)
print('SKIP_STEPS' in d)
print('RUN_CTS' in d)
vf = d.get('VERILOG_FILES',[])
print(f'VERILOG_FILES count: {len(vf)}')
print(f'First VF: {vf[0] if vf else None}')
"` executed with exit code 0.
